response:
# Car Accident Report

• **Incident Details**: Two-vehicle collision occurred on Main Street at 2:45 PM; 2007 Honda Civic (Vehicle A) struck by 2019 Ford F-150 (Vehicle B) at intersection traffic light, with Vehicle B failing to stop at red light.

• **Parties Involved**: Driver A (John Smith, age 34) sustained minor injuries; Driver B (Maria Garcia, age 28) uninjured; both vehicles towed from scene; police report filed with case number #2024-156789.

• **Damage Assessment**: Vehicle A sustained $8,500 in damage to front and driver's side; Vehicle B sustained $3,200 in damage to front bumper and hood; no pedestrians involved; Driver B cited for failure to obey traffic signal.
